# Gaia Skill Tree
> An evidence-backed public registry of AI agent capabilities.

## Registry
- Graph: https://gaia.tiongson.co/graph/gaia.json
- Named entries: https://gaia.tiongson.co/named/
- Badges: https://gaia.tiongson.co/badges/
- Trust Ledger: https://gaia.tiongson.co/trust/ledger/

## Documentation
- English docs: https://gaia.tiongson.co/en/
- Codex: https://gaia.tiongson.co/codex.html
